steps.title: Parallel lines have the same slope
steps.content: Line k is defined by $y = 7x + 2$, which has slope 7. Since line j is parallel to line k, line j must also have slope 7.

steps.title: Use the given point to find the equation
steps.content: Line j passes through the point (0, 3). The y-coordinate at $x = 0$ is 3, so the y-intercept is 3. With slope 7 and y-intercept 3, the equation of line j is $y = 7x + 3$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
